reasons: Lolita helps protect Popol's ranged position while Kupa controls close-range threats.
Popol and Kupa can pressure lane or objectives more safely when Lolita blocks or discourages enemy engage paths.

proof.summary: Lolita protects Popol's backline position, allowing Popol and Kupa to maintain lane, objective, and trap pressure.
worksBestWhen: Lolita stays near Popol during siege or objective contests.
Popol places traps before the enemy engages.
failureCases: The enemy dives from behind Popol.
Lolita's defensive tool is forced before the real fight.

reasons: Khufra gives Popol a durable frontline so Popol can keep attacking while Kupa follows up.
Khufra's control can chain with Kupa's pressure and trap-controlled zones.

proof.summary: Khufra creates frontline space and CC disruption, letting Popol and Kupa safely convert trap control into damage.
worksBestWhen: Popol sets traps around Khufra's engage path.
Kupa is available to follow up after Khufra starts.
failureCases: Popol is too far to attack after Khufra engages.
The enemy avoids the trapped zone.

reasons: Tigreal can force enemies into controlled areas where Popol's traps and Kupa follow-up matter more.
Popol can damage safely after Tigreal starts the fight.

proof.summary: Tigreal starts the teamfight, while Popol and Kupa add trap control, Kupa pressure, and sustained ranged damage around the engage area.
worksBestWhen: Popol pre-places traps near river, jungle entrance, or objective zones.
Tigreal engages toward Popol's side of the map.
failureCases: Tigreal engages away from Popol's trap setup.
The enemy clears space before the objective fight starts.

reasons: Popol's traps and Selena's vision tools can make enemy movement easier to read.
If one control tool catches the enemy, the other hero can help extend the pickoff window.

proof.summary: Popol and Selena create layered map control, making bushes and jungle entrances harder for enemies to enter safely.
worksBestWhen: Traps and vision tools are placed before the fight starts.
The team plays around the controlled zone instead of chasing randomly.
failureCases: The enemy clears or avoids the controlled area.
The team has no follow-up damage after vision catches someone.
Selena and Popol overlap vision tools without controlling different paths.

reasons: Angela can protect Popol during lane trades or skirmishes, helping him keep pressure while Kupa fights forward.
Heartguard can turn a close duel or gank around when Popol is the focus target.

proof.summary: Angela gives Popol extra shield and support during fights, helping him survive long enough for Kupa and ranged attacks to finish the trade.
worksBestWhen: Angela saves Heartguard for real dive pressure.
Popol keeps Kupa available before committing to extended trades.
failureCases: Angela attaches after Popol is already burst.
Popol is isolated too far from team follow-up.
Kupa is unavailable and Popol cannot pressure back.
